--// Melon Decompiler [Private] v1.1
--// Resolved: 156 identifiers | 42 functions | 0 strings

local Fluent = loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://github.com/dawid-scripts/Fluent/releases/latest/download/main.lua"))()
loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dawid-scripts/Fluent/master/Addons/InterfaceManager.lua"))()

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer
local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")

Workspace:FindFirstChild("Game")

local Window = Fluent:CreateWindow({
    Title = "Aoi Scripts (Jailbreak))",
    TabWidth = 160,
    Size = UDim2.fromOffset(580, 460),
    Acrylic = true,
    Theme = "Dark",
    MinimizeKey = Enum.KeyCode.RightShift
})

local Tabs = {
    Main = Window:AddTab({
        Title = "Main",
        Icon = ""
    }),
    ESP = Window:AddTab({
        Title = "ESP",
        Icon = ""
    }),
    Misc = Window:AddTab({
        Title = "Misc",
        Icon = ""
    }),
    Robberies = Window:AddTab({
        Title = "Robberies",
        Icon = ""
    })
}

Tabs.Main:AddButton({
    Title = "Give Items",
    Callback = function()
        if workspace:FindFirstChild("Givers") then
            local Player = Players.LocalPlayer
            local GiverData = nil

            if GiverData then
                for _, Data in pairs(GiverData) do
                    Data.ClickDetector.Parent = Data.OriginalParent
                    Data.Event:Disconnect()
                end
                getmetatable(GiverData):Destroy()
            end

            local NewGiverData = {}
            local TempPart = Instance.new("Part", Workspace)
            TempPart.Anchored = true
            TempPart.CanCollide = false
            TempPart.CFrame = Player.Character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart").CFrame

            setmetatable(NewGiverData, {
                __metatable = TempPart
            })

            local CurrentData = NewGiverData

            for _, Giver in pairs(Workspace.Givers:GetChildren()) do
                local ClickDetector = Giver:FindFirstChildOfClass("ClickDetector")

                if ClickDetector then
                    local DataEntry = {
                        ClickDetector = ClickDetector,
                        OriginalParent = Giver
                    }

                    ClickDetector.Parent = TempPart

                    DataEntry.Event = ClickDetector.MouseClick:Connect(function()
                        ClickDetector.Parent = Giver
                    end)

                    table.insert(NewGiverData, DataEntry)
                end
            end

            spawn(function()
                wait(10)
                if NewGiverData == CurrentData then
                    NewGiverData = nil

                    for _, Data in pairs(CurrentData) do
                        Data.ClickDetector.Parent = Data.OriginalParent
                        Data.Event:Disconnect()
                    end

                    getmetatable(CurrentData):Destroy()
                end
            end)
        end
    end
})

Tabs.Main:AddParagraph({
    Title = "Give Items",
    Content = "Pistol, Baton, Shotgun and SWAT stuff (if you bought)"
})

Tabs.Main:AddButton({
    Title = "Give Glider",
    Callback = function()
        local Player = Players.LocalPlayer
        local GliderData = nil

        if Workspace:FindFirstChild("Givers") then
            if GliderData then
                for _, Data in pairs(GliderData) do
                    Data.ClickDetector.Parent = Data.OriginalParent
                    Data.Event:Disconnect()
                end
                getmetatable(GliderData).__metatable = nil
            end

            local NewGliderData = {}
            local CurrentData = NewGliderData

            local TempPart = Instance.new("Part", Workspace)
            TempPart.Anchored = true
            TempPart.CanCollide = false
            TempPart.CFrame = Player.Character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart").CFrame

            setmetatable(NewGliderData, {
                __metatable = TempPart
            })

            local GliderGiver = Workspace.Givers:FindFirstChild("Glider")
            local GliderClickDetector = GliderGiver and GliderGiver:FindFirstChildOfClass("ClickDetector")

            if GliderClickDetector then
                local DataEntry = {
                    ClickDetector = GliderClickDetector,
                    OriginalParent = GliderGiver
                }

                GliderClickDetector.Parent = TempPart

                DataEntry.Event = GliderClickDetector.MouseClick:Connect(function()
                    GliderClickDetector.Parent = GliderGiver
                end)

                table.insert(NewGliderData, DataEntry)
            end

            spawn(function()
                wait(10)
                if NewGliderData == CurrentData then
                    NewGliderData = nil

                    for _, Data in pairs(CurrentData) do
                        Data.ClickDetector.Parent = Data.OriginalParent
                        Data.Event:Disconnect()
                    end

                    getmetatable(CurrentData).__metatable = nil
                end
            end)
        end
    end
})

local ESPToggle = Tabs.ESP:AddToggle("ESP", {
    Title = "ESP",
    Default = false
})

local ESPEnabled = false
local TracersEnabled = false
local BoxesEnabled = false
local NamesEnabled = false
local DistanceEnabled = false
local ESPDrawings = {}

local function ClearESP()
    for _, Drawing in pairs(ESPDrawings) do
        if Drawing.Line then
            Drawing.Line:Remove()
        end
        if Drawing.NameLabel then
            Drawing.NameLabel:Remove()
        end
        if Drawing.Box then
            Drawing.Box:Remove()
        end
        if Drawing.DistanceLabel then
            Drawing.DistanceLabel:Remove()
        end
    end
    ESPDrawings = {}
end

local function UpdateESP()
    ClearESP()

    if ESPEnabled then
        local Player = Players.LocalPlayer
        local Character = Player.Character
        local LocalPosition = nil

        if Character then
            local HRP = Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            if HRP then
                LocalPosition = HRP.Position
            end
        end

        for _, TargetPlayer in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
            if TargetPlayer ~= Players.LocalPlayer then
                local TargetCharacter = TargetPlayer.Character

                if TargetCharacter and TargetCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    local TargetPosition = TargetCharacter.HumanoidRootPart.Position
                    local TeamColor = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)

                    if TargetPlayer.TeamColor == BrickColor.new("Bright red") then
                        TeamColor = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
                    elseif TargetPlayer.TeamColor == BrickColor.new("Bright blue") then
                        TeamColor = Color3.new(0, 0, 1)
                    elseif TargetPlayer.TeamColor == BrickColor.new("Bright orange") then
                        TeamColor = Color3.new(1, 0.5, 0)
                    end

                    local ScreenPosition, OnScreen = Workspace.CurrentCamera:WorldToViewportPoint(TargetPosition)
                    local LocalScreenPosition = LocalPosition and Workspace.CurrentCamera:WorldToViewportPoint(LocalPosition)

                    if OnScreen and LocalScreenPosition and LocalScreenPosition.Z > 0 and TargetPlayer ~= Player then
                        if TracersEnabled then
                            local Line = Drawing.new("Line")
                            Line.Visible = true
                            Line.From = Vector2.new(LocalScreenPosition.X, LocalScreenPosition.Y)
                            Line.To = Vector2.new(ScreenPosition.X, ScreenPosition.Y)
                            Line.Color = TeamColor
                            Line.Thickness = 2
                            table.insert(ESPDrawings, { Line = Line })
                        end

                        if NamesEnabled then
                            local NameLabel = Drawing.new("Text")
                            NameLabel.Visible = true
                            NameLabel.Position = Vector2.new(ScreenPosition.X, ScreenPosition.Y)
                            NameLabel.Size = 18
                            NameLabel.Color = TeamColor
                            NameLabel.Center = true
                            NameLabel.Outline = true
                            NameLabel.Text = TargetPlayer.Name
                            table.insert(ESPDrawings, { NameLabel = NameLabel })
                        end

                        if BoxesEnabled then
                            local Box = Drawing.new("Square")
                            Box.Visible = true
                            Box.Position = Vector2.new(ScreenPosition.X - 15, ScreenPosition.Y - 30)
                            Box.Size = Vector2.new(30, 30)
                            Box.Color = TeamColor
                            Box.Thickness = 2
                            table.insert(ESPDrawings, { Box = Box })
                        end

                        if DistanceEnabled then
                            local Distance = (TargetPosition - (LocalPosition or Vector3.new())).Magnitude
                            local DistanceText = string.format("%.1f m", Distance)

                            local DistanceLabel = Drawing.new("Text")
                            DistanceLabel.Visible = true
                            DistanceLabel.Position = Vector2.new(ScreenPosition.X, ScreenPosition.Y + 15)
                            DistanceLabel.Size = 18
                            DistanceLabel.Color = TeamColor
                            DistanceLabel.Center = true
                            DistanceLabel.Outline = true
                            DistanceLabel.Text = DistanceText
                            table.insert(ESPDrawings, { DistanceLabel = DistanceLabel })
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

local TracersToggle = Tabs.ESP:AddToggle("Tracers", {
    Title = "Tracers",
    Default = false
})

local BoxesToggle = Tabs.ESP:AddToggle("Boxes", {
    Title = "Boxes",
    Default = false
})

local NamesToggle = Tabs.ESP:AddToggle("Names", {
    Title = "Names",
    Default = false
})

local DistanceToggle = Tabs.ESP:AddToggle("Distance", {
    Title = "Distance",
    Default = false
})

TracersToggle:OnChanged(function(Value)
    TracersEnabled = Value
    if ESPEnabled then
        ClearESP()
    end
end)

BoxesToggle:OnChanged(function(Value)
    BoxesEnabled = Value
    if ESPEnabled then
        ClearESP()
    end
end)

NamesToggle:OnChanged(function(Value)
    NamesEnabled = Value
    if ESPEnabled then
        ClearESP()
    end
end)

DistanceToggle:OnChanged(function(Value)
    DistanceEnabled = Value
    if ESPEnabled then
        ClearESP()
    end
end)

ESPToggle:OnChanged(function(Value)
    ESPEnabled = Value
    if not ESPEnabled then
        ClearESP()
    end
end)

RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
    if ESPEnabled then
        UpdateESP()
    end
end)

RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
    if DropESPEnabled then
        updateDropESP()
    end
end)

Tabs.Robberies:AddSection("Tomb")

local SavedSpikes = {}

Tabs.Robberies:AddToggle("RemoveSpikes", {
    Title = "Remove Spikes",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        local RobberyTomb = Workspace:FindFirstChild("RobberyTomb")
        local SpikeRoom = RobberyTomb and RobberyTomb:FindFirstChild("SpikeRoom")
        local Spikes = SpikeRoom and SpikeRoom:FindFirstChild("Spikes")

        if Spikes then
            if Value then
                SavedSpikes = {}

                for _, Child in pairs(Spikes:GetChildren()) do
                    if Child:IsA("Model") then
                        for _, SubChild in pairs(Child:GetChildren()) do
                            if SubChild:IsA("Model") and SubChild.Name == "Tile" then
                                for _, TileChild in pairs(SubChild:GetChildren()) do
                                    if TileChild:IsA("Model") and TileChild.Name == "Model" then
                                        table.insert(SavedSpikes, { TileChild:Clone(), SubChild })
                                        TileChild:Destroy()
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            else
                for _, Data in pairs(SavedSpikes) do
                    Data[1].Parent = Data[2]
                end
                SavedSpikes = {}
            end
        end
    end
})

local SavedDarts = {}

Tabs.Robberies:AddToggle("DeleteDarts", {
    Title = "Remove Darts",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        local RobberyTomb = Workspace:FindFirstChild("RobberyTomb")
        local DartRoom = RobberyTomb and RobberyTomb:FindFirstChild("DartRoom")
        local Darts = DartRoom and DartRoom:FindFirstChild("Darts")

        if Darts then
            if Value then
                SavedDarts = {}

                for _, Child in pairs(Darts:GetChildren()) do
                    if Child:IsA("BasePart") then
                        table.insert(SavedDarts, Child:Clone())
                        Child:Destroy()
                    end
                end
            else
                for _, Dart in pairs(SavedDarts) do
                    Dart.Parent = Darts
                end
                SavedDarts = {}
            end
        end
    end
})

local SavedPlanks = {}

local function RemovePlanks()
    local RobberyTomb = Workspace:FindFirstChild("RobberyTomb")

    if RobberyTomb then
        local Cart = RobberyTomb:FindFirstChild("Cart")
        local Planks = Cart and Cart:FindFirstChild("Planks")

        if Planks then
            table.insert(SavedPlanks, {
                model = Planks:Clone(),
                parent = Planks.Parent
            })
            Planks:Destroy()
        end
    end
end

local function RestorePlanks()
    for _, Data in ipairs(SavedPlanks) do
        if Data.model.Parent == nil then
            Data.model.Parent = Data.parent
        end
    end
    SavedPlanks = {}
end

Tabs.Robberies:AddToggle("RemovePlanks", {
    Title = "Remove Planks",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            RemovePlanks()
        else
            RestorePlanks()
        end
    end
})

local SavedKillModel = {}

local function RemoveKillModel()
    local RobberyTomb = Workspace:FindFirstChild("RobberyTomb")
    local Kill = RobberyTomb and RobberyTomb:FindFirstChild("Kill")

    if Kill then
        table.insert(SavedKillModel, {
            model = Kill:Clone(),
            parent = Kill.Parent
        })
        Kill:Destroy()
    end
end

local function RestoreKillModel()
    for _, Data in ipairs(SavedKillModel) do
        if Data.model.Parent == nil then
            Data.model.Parent = Data.parent
        end
    end
    SavedKillModel = {}
end

Tabs.Robberies:AddToggle("RemoveKillModel", {
    Title = "Remove Lava Damage",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            RemoveKillModel()
        else
            RestoreKillModel()
        end
    end
})

Tabs.Robberies:AddSection("PowerPlant")

local SavedBarbedWire = {}

local function RemoveBarbedWireRecursive(Parent)
    for _, Child in pairs(Parent:GetChildren()) do
        if Child:IsA("Model") and Child.Name == "Model" then
            local HasBarbedWire = false

            for _, Descendant in pairs(Child:GetDescendants()) do
                if Descendant:IsA("BasePart") and Descendant.Name == "BarbedWire" then
                    HasBarbedWire = true
                    break
                end
            end

            if HasBarbedWire then
                table.insert(SavedBarbedWire, Child:Clone())
                Child:Destroy()
            end
        else
            RemoveBarbedWireRecursive(Child)
        end
    end
end

Tabs.Robberies:AddToggle("RemoveBarbedWireModel", {
    Title = "Remove Lasers",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            RemoveBarbedWireRecursive(workspace)
        else
            for _, Model in pairs(SavedBarbedWire) do
                Model.Parent = workspace
            end
            SavedBarbedWire = {}
        end
    end
})

Tabs.Robberies:AddSection("Jelwery")

Tabs.Robberies:AddToggle("RemoveBarbedWireAndCamera", {
    Title = "Not working",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(_) end
})

Tabs.Robberies:AddSection("Bank")

local SavedBankLasers = {}

local function RemoveBankLasersRecursive(Parent)
    for _, Child in pairs(Parent:GetChildren()) do
        if Child:IsA("Model") and Child.Name == "Lasers" then
            table.insert(SavedBankLasers, Child:Clone())
            Child:Destroy()
        else
            RemoveBankLasersRecursive(Child)
        end
    end
end

Tabs.Robberies:AddToggle("RemoveLasersBank1", {
    Title = "Remove 1st city Bank Lasers",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        local Banks = workspace:FindFirstChild("Banks")
        local Bank = Banks and Banks:FindFirstChild("Bank")

        if Bank then
            if Value then
                RemoveBankLasersRecursive(Bank)
            else
                for _, Laser in pairs(SavedBankLasers) do
                    Laser.Parent = Bank
                end
                SavedBankLasers = {}
            end
        end
    end
})

local SavedBank2Lasers = {}

local function RemoveBank2LasersRecursive(Parent)
    for _, Child in pairs(Parent:GetChildren()) do
        if Child:IsA("Model") and Child.Name == "Lasers" then
            table.insert(SavedBank2Lasers, Child:Clone())
            Child:Destroy()
        else
            RemoveBank2LasersRecursive(Child)
        end
    end
end

Tabs.Robberies:AddToggle("RemoveBank2Lasers", {
    Title = "Remove 2nd city Bank Lasers",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        local Banks = workspace:FindFirstChild("Banks")

        if Banks then
            local Bank2 = Banks:FindFirstChild("Bank2")
            local Layout = Bank2 and Bank2:FindFirstChild("Layout")

            if Layout then
                if Value then
                    RemoveBank2LasersRecursive(Layout)
                else
                    for _, Laser in pairs(SavedBank2Lasers) do
                        Laser.Parent = Layout
                    end
                    SavedBank2Lasers = {}
                end
            end
        end
    end
})

Tabs.Robberies:AddSection("Casino")

local SavedCasinoModels = {}

local function RemoveCasinoModelsRecursive(Parent, TargetNames)
    for _, Child in pairs(Parent:GetChildren()) do
        if Child:IsA("Model") and table.find(TargetNames, Child.Name) then
            SavedCasinoModels[Child.Name] = Child:Clone()
            Child:Destroy()
        else
            RemoveCasinoModelsRecursive(Child, TargetNames)
        end
    end
end

local function RestoreCasinoModels()
    for _, Model in pairs(SavedCasinoModels) do
        Model.Parent = workspace
    end
    SavedCasinoModels = {}
end

Tabs.Robberies:AddToggle("RemoveCasinoModels", {
    Title = "Remove Lasers",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            RemoveCasinoModelsRecursive(workspace, {
                "Lasers",
                "CamerasMoving",
                "LaserCarousel",
                "LasersMoving",
                "VaultLaserControl"
            })
        else
            RestoreCasinoModels()
        end
    end
})

Tabs.Robberies:AddSection("Museum")

local SavedMuseumLights = nil

local function RemoveMuseumLights(Parent)
    local Museum = Parent:FindFirstChild("Museum")
    local Lights = Museum and Museum:FindFirstChild("Lights")

    if Lights then
        SavedMuseumLights = Lights:Clone()
        Lights:Destroy()
    end
end

local function RestoreMuseumLights()
    if SavedMuseumLights then
        SavedMuseumLights.Parent = workspace.Museum
        SavedMuseumLights = nil
    end
end

Tabs.Robberies:AddToggle("RemoveMuseumLaser", {
    Title = "Remove Lasers",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            RemoveMuseumLights(workspace)
        else
            RestoreMuseumLights()
        end
    end
})

Tabs.Robberies:AddSection("Mansion")

local SavedMansionBarbedWire = {}
local SavedMansionLasers = {}
local SavedMansionLaserTraps = {}
local SavedMansionGuards = {}
local SavedMansionShields = {}

local function RemoveMansionBarbedWire()
    local MansionDecorative = Workspace:FindFirstChild("MansionDecorative")

    if MansionDecorative then
        for _, Descendant in pairs(MansionDecorative:GetDescendants()) do
            if Descendant:IsA("BasePart") and Descendant.Name == "BarbedWire" then
                table.insert(SavedMansionBarbedWire, {
                    part = Descendant:Clone(),
                    parent = Descendant.Parent
                })
                Descendant:Destroy()
            end
        end
    end

    for _, Child in pairs(Workspace:GetChildren()) do
        if Child:IsA("BasePart") and Child.Name == "BarbedWire" then
            table.insert(SavedMansionBarbedWire, {
                part = Child:Clone(),
                parent = Child.Parent
            })
            Child:Destroy()
        end
    end
end

local function RestoreMansionBarbedWire()
    for _, Data in ipairs(SavedMansionBarbedWire) do
        if Data.part.Parent == nil then
            Data.part.Parent = Data.parent
        end
    end
    SavedMansionBarbedWire = {}
end

local function RemoveMansionLasers()
    local MansionRobbery = Workspace:FindFirstChild("MansionRobbery")
    local Lasers = MansionRobbery and MansionRobbery:FindFirstChild("Lasers")

    if Lasers then
        table.insert(SavedMansionLasers, {
            model = Lasers:Clone(),
            parent = Lasers.Parent
        })
        Lasers:Destroy()
    end
end

local function RestoreMansionLasers()
    for _, Data in ipairs(SavedMansionLasers) do
        if Data.model.Parent == nil then
            Data.model.Parent = Data.parent
        end
    end
    SavedMansionLasers = {}
end

local function RemoveMansionLaserTraps()
    local MansionRobbery = Workspace:FindFirstChild("MansionRobbery")
    local LaserTraps = MansionRobbery and MansionRobbery:FindFirstChild("LaserTraps")

    if LaserTraps then
        table.insert(SavedMansionLaserTraps, {
            model = LaserTraps:Clone(),
            parent = LaserTraps.Parent
        })
        LaserTraps:Destroy()
    end
end

local function RestoreMansionLaserTraps()
    for _, Data in ipairs(SavedMansionLaserTraps) do
        if Data.model.Parent == nil then
            Data.model.Parent = Data.parent
        end
    end
    SavedMansionLaserTraps = {}
end

local function RemoveMansionGuards()
    local MansionRobbery = Workspace:FindFirstChild("MansionRobbery")
    local GuardsFolder = MansionRobbery and MansionRobbery:FindFirstChild("GuardsFolder")

    if GuardsFolder then
        table.insert(SavedMansionGuards, {
            folder = GuardsFolder:Clone(),
            parent = GuardsFolder.Parent
        })
        GuardsFolder:Destroy()
    end
end

local function RestoreMansionGuards()
    for _, Data in ipairs(SavedMansionGuards) do
        if Data.folder.Parent == nil then
            Data.folder.Parent = Data.parent
        end
    end
    SavedMansionGuards = {}
end

local function RemoveMansionShields()
    local MansionRobbery = Workspace:FindFirstChild("MansionRobbery")
    local Shields = MansionRobbery and MansionRobbery:FindFirstChild("Shields")

    if Shields then
        table.insert(SavedMansionShields, {
            model = Shields:Clone(),
            parent = Shields.Parent
        })
        Shields:Destroy()
    end
end

local function RestoreMansionShields()
    for _, Data in ipairs(SavedMansionShields) do
        if Data.model.Parent == nil then
            Data.model.Parent = Data.parent
        end
    end
    SavedMansionShields = {}
end

Tabs.Robberies:AddToggle("RemoveBarbedWireAndLasers", {
    Title = "Remove Lasers",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            RemoveMansionBarbedWire()
            RemoveMansionLasers()
        else
            RestoreMansionBarbedWire()
            RestoreMansionLasers()
        end
    end
})

Tabs.Robberies:AddToggle("RemoveLaserTraps", {
    Title = "Remove Laser Traps",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            RemoveMansionLaserTraps()
        else
            RestoreMansionLaserTraps()
        end
    end
})

Tabs.Robberies:AddToggle("RemoveGuardsFolder", {
    Title = "Remove NPCs",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            RemoveMansionGuards()
        else
            RestoreMansionGuards()
        end
    end
})

Tabs.Robberies:AddToggle("RemoveShields", {
    Title = "Remove CEO Walls",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            RemoveMansionShields()
        else
            RestoreMansionShields()
        end
    end
})

Tabs.Robberies:AddSection("Oil Rig")

local SavedOilRigGuards = {}

local function RemoveOilRigGuards()
    local OilRig = Workspace:FindFirstChild("OilRig")
    local GuardsFolder = OilRig and OilRig:FindFirstChild("GuardsFolder")

    if GuardsFolder then
        table.insert(SavedOilRigGuards, {
            folder = GuardsFolder:Clone(),
            parent = GuardsFolder.Parent
        })
        GuardsFolder:Destroy()
    end
end

local function RestoreOilRigGuards()
    for _, Data in ipairs(SavedOilRigGuards) do
        if Data.folder.Parent == nil then
            Data.folder.Parent = Data.parent
        end
    end
    SavedOilRigGuards = {}
end

Tabs.Robberies:AddToggle("RemoveGuardsFolder", {
    Title = "Remove NPCs",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            RemoveOilRigGuards()
        else
            RestoreOilRigGuards()
        end
    end
})

local SavedOilRigLasers = {}

local function RemoveOilRigLasers()
    local OilRig = Workspace:FindFirstChild("OilRig")
    local MovingLasers = OilRig and OilRig:FindFirstChild("MovingLasers")

    if MovingLasers then
        table.insert(SavedOilRigLasers, {
            model = MovingLasers:Clone(),
            parent = MovingLasers.Parent
        })
        MovingLasers:Destroy()
    end
end

local function RestoreOilRigLasers()
    for _, Data in ipairs(SavedOilRigLasers) do
        if Data.model.Parent == nil then
            Data.model.Parent = Data.parent
        end
    end
    SavedOilRigLasers = {}
end

Tabs.Robberies:AddToggle("RemoveMovingLasers", {
    Title = "Remove Lasers",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            RemoveOilRigLasers()
        else
            RestoreOilRigLasers()
        end
    end
})

local SavedOilRigTurrets = {}

local function RemoveOilRigTurrets()
    local OilRig = Workspace:FindFirstChild("OilRig")
    local Turrets = OilRig and OilRig:FindFirstChild("Turrets")

    if Turrets then
        table.insert(SavedOilRigTurrets, {
            model = Turrets:Clone(),
            parent = Turrets.Parent
        })
        Turrets:Destroy()
    end
end

local function RestoreOilRigTurrets()
    for _, Data in ipairs(SavedOilRigTurrets) do
        if Data.model.Parent == nil then
            Data.model.Parent = Data.parent
        end
    end
    SavedOilRigTurrets = {}
end

Tabs.Robberies:AddToggle("RemoveTurrets", {
    Title = "Remove Turrets",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            RemoveOilRigTurrets()
        else
            RestoreOilRigTurrets()
        end
    end
})

Tabs.Robberies:AddSection("CargoShip")

local SavedCargoShipTurrets = {}

local function RemoveCargoShipTurrets()
    local CargoShip = Workspace:FindFirstChild("CargoShip")

    if CargoShip then
        local TurretBack = CargoShip:FindFirstChild("TurretBack")
        local TurretFront = CargoShip:FindFirstChild("TurretFront")

        if TurretBack and TurretFront then
            table.insert(SavedCargoShipTurrets, {
                back = TurretBack:Clone(),
                front = TurretFront:Clone(),
                parent = TurretBack.Parent
            })
            TurretBack:Destroy()
            TurretFront:Destroy()
        end
    end
end

local function RestoreCargoShipTurrets()
    for _, Data in ipairs(SavedCargoShipTurrets) do
        if Data.back.Parent == nil then
            Data.back.Parent = Data.parent
        end
        if Data.front.Parent == nil then
            Data.front.Parent = Data.parent
        end
    end
    SavedCargoShipTurrets = {}
end

Tabs.Robberies:AddToggle("RemoveTurretsCargoShip", {
    Title = "Remove Turrets",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            RemoveCargoShipTurrets()
        else
            RestoreCargoShipTurrets()
        end
    end
})

Tabs.Robberies:AddSection("Airdrop")

local SavedAirdropNPCs = nil

local function RemoveAirdropNPCs(Parent)
    local Drop = Parent:FindFirstChild("Drop")
    local NPCs = Drop and Drop:FindFirstChild("NPCs")

    if NPCs then
        SavedAirdropNPCs = NPCs:Clone()
        NPCs:Destroy()
    end
end

local function RestoreAirdropNPCs()
    if SavedAirdropNPCs then
        SavedAirdropNPCs.Parent = workspace.Drop
        SavedAirdropNPCs = nil
    end
end

Tabs.Robberies:AddToggle("DisableNPCs", {
    Title = "Remove NPCs",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            RemoveAirdropNPCs(workspace)
        else
            RestoreAirdropNPCs()
        end
    end
})

local InfiniteJumpEnabled = false

Tabs.Misc:AddToggle("Infinite Jump", {
    Title = "Infinite Jump",
    Default = false
}):OnChanged(function(Value)
    InfiniteJumpEnabled = Value
end)

UserInputService.JumpRequest:Connect(function()
    if InfiniteJumpEnabled then
        Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid"):ChangeState("Jumping")
    end
end)

local ClickTPEnabled = false

Tabs.Misc:AddToggle("Click TP", {
    Title = "Click TP",
    Default = false
}):OnChanged(function(Value)
    ClickTPEnabled = Value
end)

UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(Input)
    if ClickTPEnabled and Input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then
        local TargetPosition = LocalPlayer:GetMouse().Hit.Position
        LocalPlayer.Character:MoveTo(TargetPosition)
    end
end)
